message:
fix(init): use DefaultConfig for port resolution during init (GH#2372)

bd init was leaving ServerPort=0, which applyConfigDefaults set to 3307.
When another project's server was already on 3307, init silently connected
to it instead of starting a per-project server — another cross-project
data leakage vector.

Also adds backup/ to .beads/.gitignore and doctor template (follow-up
from PR #2351 which untracked the files but didn't add the ignore entry.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)

files.patch:
@@ -34,6 +34,9 @@ dolt-server.port
 dolt-server.activity
 dolt-monitor.pid
 
+# Backup data (auto-exported JSONL, local-only)
+backup/
+
 # Legacy artifacts (safety net — prevents accidental commits of old files)
 *.db
 *.db?*

@@ -45,6 +45,9 @@ dolt-server.port
 dolt-server.activity
 dolt-monitor.pid
 
+# Backup data (auto-exported JSONL, local-only)
+backup/
+
 # Legacy files (from pre-Dolt versions)
 *.db
 *.db?*

@@ -377,10 +377,18 @@ environment variable.`,
 
 		// Build config. Beads always uses dolt sql-server.
 		// AutoStart is always enabled during init — we need a server to initialize the database.
+		//
+		// Use doltserver.DefaultConfig to resolve the port via the standard chain
+		// (env var → port file → config.yaml → DerivePort). Without this, the
+		// store's applyConfigDefaults falls back to DefaultSQLPort (3307), which
+		// may belong to a DIFFERENT project's server, causing cross-project data
+		// leakage (GH#2372).
+		doltDefaults := doltserver.DefaultConfig(beadsDir)
 		doltCfg := &dolt.Config{
 			Path:            storagePath,
 			BeadsDir:        beadsDir,
 			Database:        dbName,
+			ServerPort:      doltDefaults.Port,
 			CreateIfMissing: true, // bd init is the only path that should create databases
 			AutoStart:       os.Getenv("BEADS_DOLT_AUTO_START") != "0",
 		}
